_comment: The Lidless Labs fleet roster: every public product repo, grouped exactly like the org profile (lidless-labs/.github). build-marks.mjs stamps the shared eye mark for each entry as dist/<slug>-circle.svg; the same roster drives the 'Part of Lidless Labs' footer. Keep in sync with the org profile categories. Infra repos (lidless-fleet-kit, effect-operator-kit) are intentionally omitted: they are the rack, not the instruments.
